* It will calculate the total rainfall by summing all values in the list.

* The function will return a float representing the average monthly rainfall.  
* The function will handle the input list correctly, regardless of its length.  
* The function will avoid errors when the input list is empty or has fewer than 12 elements.  
* The function will ensure the output is a float with appropriate decimal precision.
